survey.title: School Climate, Bullying and Cyberbullying Survey_TECH4ZERO_US_v2
survey.population: Middle and High School (12-18 years), United States
survey.note: Grade question (zero_general_grado) is captured on the entry screen before loading this survey and saved as the first answer of the response.

violencia_internivel.note: Módulo condicional — aplica solo a escuelas K-12 con primaria y secundaria en el mismo campus.

victimizacion.note: Ítems redactados con criterio de repetición explícita (UN MISMO compañero/grupo + REPETIDAMENTE) para diferenciar bullying de conflicto puntual.

ecologia_espacios.note: Solo para estudiantes que reportaron victimización.

mapa.note: Mapeo de espacios físicos donde ocurre el bullying. Solo para estudiantes que reportaron victimización. Usar para identificar hotspots dentro del campus.
mapa.analytics_use: Rankear ubicaciones por puntaje promedio para identificar zonas de riesgo prioritarias

questions.text: How old are you?
Which gender do you identify with?
Is an indigenous language spoken in your home?
How long have you been at this school?
What type of school is this?
My homeroom teacher enforces classroom rules fairly.

options.text: Never / 0 times in the last two months
Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: When there is a conflict between students, my homeroom teacher listens to all sides before deciding what to do.

options.text: Never / 0 times in the last two months
Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: When someone is humiliated or excluded in front of others, my homeroom teacher intervenes immediately and stops the situation.

options.text: Never / 0 times in the last two months
Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: When my homeroom teacher intervenes in a student conflict, they follow up afterward to make sure everything is okay.

options.text: Never / 0 times in the last two months
Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: If I report a bullying problem to my homeroom teacher (including via text, social media, or online), they take concrete action to address it.

Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: When there is a digital bullying problem, my homeroom teacher coordinates with my parents or the school administration to resolve it.

options.text: Never / 0 times in the last two months
Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: My homeroom teacher shows they care about how I feel in the classroom, not just about what I do wrong.

Always / several times a week or more

questions.text: I feel safe knowing that if I report bullying, I will not be called a 'snitch' or 'tattletale' by other students.

questions.text: I have seen adults specifically supervising how older and younger students interact in hallways, bathrooms, and entrances.

questions.notes: Ítem sensible — se muestra aviso de confidencialidad y recursos de apoyo antes de esta pregunta. Línea de la Vida: 800 911 2000.
